The '''Uggernaught''' was the nickname for an [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]]-made [[Walker/Legends|walker]] manufactured by [[Bespin Motors/Legends|Bespin Motors]].

==Characteristics==
The walker had an open cockpit where the driver and operator—or gunner—were seated. The gunner was positioned towards the rear of the walker, behind a protective plate.

Designed as a load-lifting exoskeleton, maintenance Uggernaughts featured [[Plasma torch/Legends|plasma torches]] and [[magnetic projector]]s for lifting extremely heavy materials.<ref name="CSWE" />

==History==
Uggernaughts were employed throughout [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] on construction platforms.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]''
